content: OpenCTI TAXII 2.1 uses Bearer token auth: header 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'. TAXII discovery endpoint: GET /taxii2/root/collections/ with Accept: application/taxii+json header. Full object retrieval: GET /taxii2/root/collections/{id}/objects/. Auth header format confirmed from OpenCTI integration docs. The CONTEXT.md decision D-10 already captured: GET localhost:8080/taxii2/root/collections/ with OpenCTI token header.
